On the menu

Made fresh, served generous

From the corn fritter stacks to our famous sourdough melts, everything's made to be the best part of your day.

All Day

Corn Fritter Stacks

Homemade corn fritters stacked with smoked salmon, avocado, tomato relish & sour cream.

House Favourite

Brekkie All Day

Big breakfasts, eggs your way, French toast with strawberries — served right through till close.

Baked Next Door

Cakes & Sweet Treats

Baked fresh each day at The Blind Baker — carrot cake, scones, cookies, muffins & more.

The courtyard

Sunny in winter, cool and green in summer.

Our leafy courtyard is the heart of Chaddies — a quiet, green spot tucked away from the street where locals settle in for hours.

Bring the family, bring the dog, bring a friend you haven't caught up with in too long.

  • Shaded and green through the warmer months
  • Catches the winter sun beautifully
  • Dog friendly & family welcome

Come and take a break

Whether it's a quick coffee or a long lunch in the courtyard, there's always a seat for you at Chaddies.

Call (02) 4952 5484

Our story

About Chaddies

A neighbourhood cafe that's been part of the New Lambton furniture for years.

Chaddies on Regent is a local in the truest sense. Tucked into Regent Street in New Lambton, it's the kind of place where the staff know your order and the courtyard fills up with regulars who've been coming for years.

Everything is made with care — from the all-day breakfasts and homemade corn fritter stacks to the rissoles and mash. And because The Blind Baker sits right next door, every scone, loaf and baked treat lands on your plate fresh from the oven.

It's good food, good coffee, and a green courtyard to enjoy them in. Nothing fussy — just a proper neighbourhood cafe doing it well.

🤝

Community Hub

A meeting spot for locals — where catch-ups stretch long and everyone's welcome.

🌾

Fresh & Local

Baked goods made next door at The Blind Baker, served the same day they're made.

👨‍👩‍👧

Family Friendly

Kids menu, a dog-friendly courtyard, and a relaxed pace that suits everyone.

The best place to kick off your day, or just take a break and enjoy a delicious meal or coffee.
— The Chaddies Team
